summary: Final docs gate for the App→app rename + 7 OBP folder merges. Coder pre-swept Documentation/v0.2 and Runtime2/data-spec.md in commit a146aa9d9 and filed a CLAUDE.md proposal. I applied the proposal (3 stale-line fixes + new Runtime2 Conventions bullet covering lowercase rule, property-vs-type distinction, Default carve-out, two pending action renames), scrubbed the 8 R1 + 1 R2 docstring drift sites and the larger PLang/app/GlobalUsings.cs comment block, rewrote Documentation/v0.2/app-tree.md to reflect the merges, and lowercased path references across build.md / build_process.md / builder-data-t-roadmap.md / todos.md / Documentation/Runtime2/todos.md. Property-access references (ctx.App.X) were deliberately preserved per the documented convention. Build remains clean.

changes.description: Applied coder v3 proposal: 3 stale-line fixes (Console.* example, PLNG001 gate, test alias clash) + new Runtime2 Conventions bullet covering lowercase rule, 7 merged engine concepts, property-name PascalCase carve-out, Default keyword carve-out, action renames.
Lines 19, 20, 56, 64, 65, 68-79: lowercased every namespace-position App.X reference in the comment block; preserved 'Builder property' property-position references.

Substantive rewrite: lowercased all source paths; remapped Cache/Builder/Callback/Settings/Modules/Code/Debug rows to app/modules/<name>/ (no longer top-level); added Case-Convention section with property-vs-type rule; renamed module 'app' → 'environment'; noted builder.app → builder.load.
All 20 PLang/App/... references lowercased; PLang/App/Build/ and PLang/App/Debug/ remapped to their post-merge homes (app/modules/builder/ and app/modules/debug/).
Type-position App.X.Y refs lowercased (Variable, Events.Lifecycle.Bindings); file paths remapped including merged Debug/.

findings.issue: Folder name still PascalCase under lowercased app/data/.
findings.detail: Codeanalyzer S1 — one-folder rename + ~6 references. Pure case fix.

findings.issue: PLang actions environment.run and builder.load are pressure-chosen names from the rename.
findings.detail: Codeanalyzer S3 — wants a deliberate naming pass with Ingi before next release. Documented in /CLAUDE.md so future bots reading the rule know these are temporary.

findings.issue: Mentioned PLang/app/modules/builder/providers/DefaultBuilderProvider.cs — that providers/ subdir no longer exists (builder uses code/Default.cs).
findings.detail: Remapped to PLang/app/modules/builder/code/Default.cs:18 (where _buildTimer actually lives post-merge). Noted in the entry that the field was also de-staticized to 'private readonly', so the underlying concern is resolved at that site.

claude_md_proposals.reason: Three stale lines reference paths that no longer exist post-rename; new Runtime2 Conventions bullet captures the property-vs-type distinction (most error-prone aspect of the rename), Default carve-out, and pending action renames — all canonical for future work in this subtree.
